mapper.sql: rp.id AS id, rp.create_by AS create_by, rp.create_time AS create_time, rp.update_by AS update_by, rp.update_time AS update_time, rp.is_delete AS is_delete, r.id AS role_id, r.name AS role_name, r.role_key AS role_key, p.id AS permission_id, p.name AS permission_name, p.permission_key AS permission_key
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tb_role_permission rp INNER JOIN tb_role r ON r.id = rp.role_id AND r.is_delete = 0 INNER JOIN tb_permission p ON p.id = rp.permission_id AND p.is_delete = 0 WHERE rp.is_delete = 0 ORDER BY rp.create_time ASC

SELECT
FROM tb_role_permission rp INNER JOIN tb_role r ON r.id = rp.role_id AND r.is_delete = 0 INNER JOIN tb_permission p ON p.id = rp.permission_id AND p.is_delete = 0 WHERE rp.is_delete = 0 AND rp.role_id = #{roleId}

SELECT
FROM tb_role_permission rp INNER JOIN tb_role r ON r.id = rp.role_id AND r.is_delete = 0 INNER JOIN tb_permission p ON p.id = rp.permission_id AND p.is_delete = 0 WHERE rp.is_delete = 0 AND rp.permission_id = #{permissionId}
